examples: She vaulted over the gate and ran up the path.
Wealth per person has vaulted by 150% in the past decade, from $2, 000 to $5, 000.
Through more vaulted corridors he passed areas where visitors were schooled in the monastic way of life.
To witness its vaulted roof and Romanesque frescoed apses glow in such brilliance is like entering heaven itself.
Beijing South Station is shaped like a flying saucer, its silvery vaulted ceiling illuminated by skylights.
